title: Tasty American Ground Pork Toast
description: A peppery and chewy American dish featuring ground pork, perfect for a brunch mood, served on top of toasted bread with a dash of friendly spices.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground pork to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Once the pork is browned, add the chopped onion, black pepper, salt, and garlic powder to the skillet.
Continue cooking until the onion is translucent.
Meanwhile, toast the bread slices until they are lightly browned.
Add a spoonful of the pork mixture on top of each bread slice.
Drizzle the beaten egg over the pork mixture.
Sprinkle shredded cheddar cheese over the top.
Place the skillet under the broiler for a few minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
